title: werauhia rugosa
intro: Werauhia rugosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae, commonly known as a pineapple flower or a type of air plant. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Werauhia rugosa include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
